category_sources: Official scummvm/scummvm-tools README describes a collection of tools useful with ScummVM.
source_facts.description says it is a collection of tools for ScummVM.
display_name_sources: Official ScummVM tools repository README uses ScummVM Tools.
docs_sources: Official ScummVM tools README is primary documentation and points to the ScummVM Tools wiki page.
repo_sources: Verified official ScummVM GitHub organization lists scummvm-tools as the ScummVM tools repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists extraction, compression, decompiler, and scummvm-tools CLI utilities.
